lakecia-gunter.profile
● online
// Technology leadership & board governance

25 years building
technology at scale.
Now helping others
do the same.

Former CTO @ Microsoft Chief of Staff @ Intel Board Director @ IDEX DoD Alumni
cat about.txt

I'm a 25-year technology industry veteran. I've driven enterprise innovation and profitable growth for global technology companies, with deep expertise spanning artificial intelligence, global partner strategy, platform transformation, and new-business acceleration.

My career spans the U.S. Federal Government and global Fortune 50 enterprises. I began as a digital logic designer and program manager at the Department of Defense, then served as Chief of Staff to the CEO at Intel. Most recently, as CTO for Global Partner Solutions at Microsoft, I led multi-billion-dollar platforms and global partner ecosystems.
